about us

Time is Money they said & we heard. Introducing a bot that takes pride in providing the fastest service ever. We bring you a completely automatic Book where you get the fastest online sports & casino betting site and exclusive bonuses. Now have the entire Book at your fingertips!

  • Why JitoDaily Bot?
  • Remembers all of your IDs
  • No need to fill withdrawal forms daily. Save your bank account for easier withdrawal.
  • No more waiting of 45 minutes for withdrawal. Get the amount credited in seconds.
  • Self Deposit, Withdraw, & create account.
  • Available in Multi languages. Select the one you are comfortable in.

The most trusted destination for Online Sports ID, Online Gaming ID, Online Cricket ID, and Online Casino ID for betting is the JitoDaily website. So, start online gaming with the Best Online Sports ID Provider. Get a chance to create the Fastest Sports ID. You can Withdraw, deposit, refill & play limitless with your Online ID on JitoDaily.

 

At JitoDaily, we provide a fully functional Fastest Automatic Online Book for Betting. You can create an ID and start betting on Cricket, casinos, and Sports. So we are one of the Best Automatic Online Sports, Cricket, and Casino Betting ID Providers in India. We bring you a completely Auto Online Book. Now have the entire Automatic Sports Gaming Online Book at your fingertips! Here, you can receive a variety of Online Sports Gaming IDs for betting.

 

JitoDaily provides you with the Fastest Gaming IDs necessary for an online gamer to bet and play online. Sitting at home and comfortably playing limitless games and winning millions is fantastic fun! All you need is an Online Cricket ID or Online Casino ID that we provide along with trouble-free, safe, and Fastest Cash Withdrawals and Deposits.

 

We will share a completely automatic sportsbook with the best welcome bonuses on this page. Play on India’s first Automatic Online Book! where you can get the Fastest Online Sports and Casino IDs. Get a complete list at your fingertips. So, hurry up, and create your Online Sports and Gaming ID on JitoDaily.

 

If you want to play online cricket betting, you need to look for a website that provides online betting options. To play online cricket betting, the user must create an ID, which means the user needs to create an account on that particular site or app to play cricket betting.

 

JitoDaily provides the best online cricket betting id to its users with 100% satisfaction services. It has a dedicated Telegram and WhatsApp support team to help its users to create IDs. JitoDaily allows you to create your IDs; if you don’t want to create an ID, then it provides Demo IDs. You can use demo IDs, too, and start online cricket betting.

FAQ! Need help?

How to Play at JitoDaily?

JitoDaily is one of the simplest Automatic Online Books ever. If you wish to create a new Online Sports ID watch the tutorial or speak to our customer care executive here-https://telegram.me/jitoDailySupport

How much time does it take to get withdrawal from JitoDaily?

JitoDaily saves your bank account number at Bank Manager 🏦, you can simply click on your already saved bank account and get withdrawal within seconds. Watch tutorial for more details.

How to contact JitoDaily?

For any kind of help or assistance contact us on telegram – https://telegram.me/jitoDailySupport or mail us at help@jitodaily.com

How to identify real or fake JitoDaily book?

Players beware, anyone can fake your identity and ask you to play. Note that you can only trust on the links provided on www.jitodaily.com You can get all kinds of Sports Online Gaming IDs here.

Can I get tips & predictions?

Yes! Join  https://telegram.me/JitoDailyOnlineBook channel for Daily updates & Join https://telegram.me/JitoDailyGroup group for Tips & Discussion.

Where can I play JitoDaily? What is JitoDaily’s WhatsApp number?

JitoDaily is a telegram-based Auto-online Sports & Casino book site and we only operate on Telegram. We provide the Fastest online ID and easier service than any other WhatsApp online book. 

What can I Do at JitoDaily?

Here  you can Self Deposit, Self Withdraw, Create ID, & Reset your Password on your own. You can choose your favorite site from an array of Best Sports & Casino Betting sites.

What are you waiting for? Get started with your Telegram ID, No need of any verification or mobile number sharing!
